messages.content: Identify the latest instance where someone pushed back on my idea. Produce a 2-sentence collaborative reply I could have used to acknowledge and address the objection.

Dug see last pushback. Who push? When? Need lifelogs. 🗿

Tell Dug which meeting or day, or Dug search lifelogs now? 🗿
Searching your lifelogs for recent instances of pushback on your ideas... I'll search the last 30 days.

args.query: pushback OR objected OR concern OR disagreed OR "not sure" OR "I don't think" OR "won't work"

messages.content:
Dug find one. 🗿

Dug think latest pushback from team was in Hebrew meeting on Sep 29 — someone said: \"אבל זה לא מתאים לטורנייג'ר.\" 🗿

Two-sentence collaborative reply you could have used:
- \"Thanks — good point, I hear concern it may not fit the tournament/user group. Let’s list the mismatch items now and test one small change to see if it solves the issue.\"
